title: azalea farrerae
intro: Azalea farrerae, also known as the fern-leaf azalea, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. Azalea farrerae has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
